title: Mildly Fried Italian Chicken Saltimbocca
description: Rich, fluffy, quick-fix Italian (Sardinian) dish featuring chicken, pressure-cooked to perfection, served in a banana leaf. This paleo-friendly dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: boneless, skinless chicken breast
ingredients.notes: 1 pound or 1.8 kg, cut into thin cutlets

instructions: Season the chicken cutlets with salt and pepper.
In a pan, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken cutlets to the pan and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Transfer the chicken to a pressure cooker and add 1 cup of chicken broth and 1 tablespoon of lemon juice.
Close the lid of the pressure cooker and cook for 10 minutes.
While the chicken is cooking, slice the prosciutto and fresh sage leaves into thin strips.
Prepare the banana leaves by cutting a piece large enough to wrap the chicken.
After the chicken has cooked, remove it from the pressure cooker and wrap it in the banana leaf with the prosciutto and sage.
Return the chicken to the pressure cooker and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with additional sage if desired.
